task_completion.description: Interrupt the current telescope operations near Polaris.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Observatory control software showing an explicit 'Abort' or 'Stop' action on the current Polaris imaging sequence, or the mount status changing from tracking Polaris to idle/slewing.

task_completion.description: Slew the telescope to the GRB 221009A target coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Telescope mount control interface showing the target set to GRB 221009A, or coordinates matching RA 19.2176h and Dec 19.7733 deg, with the mount actively slewing or tracking.

task_completion.description: Configure the confirmation phase of the ToO imaging protocol.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Camera sequence planner or imaging queue showing a job configured for at least 3 frames, 10 seconds exposure time, using Filter Slot 1 (or Luminance).

task_completion.description: Configure the science phase of the ToO imaging protocol.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Camera sequence planner or imaging queue showing a second job configured for at least 10 frames, 30 seconds exposure time, using Filter Slot 1 (or Luminance).

task_completion.description: Set the correct output directory for the captured images.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The imaging software's save path or sequence configuration explicitly showing the output directory set to /home/ga/Images/grb/221009A/.

task_completion.description: Generate and save the GCN Circular report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor open showing the drafted GCN Circular report containing details about GRB 221009A, saved to the path /home/ga/Documents/gcn_circular.txt.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the actual observatory GUI for telescope and camera control.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with astronomy software (e.g., KStars, Ekos, NINA) rather than terminal commands bypassing the UI.

integrity.description: Ensure images were captured via the software sequence, not mocked.
integrity.visual_evidence: The imaging sequence should be visibly running or completed in the GUI. There should be no terminal commands like 'touch' or 'cp' used to fake the FITS/image files in the target directory.

integrity.description: Ensure the GCN report was genuinely drafted with task-specific details.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text editor should show a report populated with the specific GRB 221009A details, not just an empty file or an unmodified template.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target: GRB 221009A. Coordinates: RA 19.2176h, Dec 19.7733 deg (tolerance 15 arcmin). Filter: Slot 1 (Luminance). Confirmation phase: >= 3 frames, 10s exposure. Science phase: >= 10 frames, 30s exposure. Image save path: /home/ga/Images/grb/221009A/. Report save path: /home/ga/Documents/gcn_circular.txt.
